two_factor.title: Whakauru taupū-ā-rua
two_factor.subtitle: I tukuna e matou he waehere 6-mati ki %{email}. Whakauru i raro nei kia tohu ai.
two_factor.enter_six_digits: Whakauru i te waehere 6-mati mai i tō īmera
two_factor.session_expired: I pau te whakatūtei — whakauru anō
two_factor.new_code_sent: I tukuna te waehere hou ki %{email}
two_factor.could_not_resend: I kore te tuku anō i te waehere
two_factor.status_on: Kei te ON te whakatūturu taupū-ā-rua
two_factor.status_off: Kei te OFF te whakatūturu taupū-ā-rua
two_factor.status_on_body: Ki te whakauru koe, ka tukuna e matou he waehere 6-mati ki %{email}.
two_factor.status_off_body: Tāpiri i te tawhiti nui o te haumaru mā te hiahia i te waehere mai i tō īmera ki te whakauru.
two_factor.code_prompt: Whakauru i te waenga tau 6-kupu i tukuna mai e matou:
two_factor.turn_off_msg: Ka iti ake te kalitatanga o te pokapū. Ka tukuna e matou he waenga hei whakatūtuki ko koe.
two_factor.enabled_alert_body: Mai i tenei wa, me whakauru koe i te waenga īmēra hei takihi.
two_factor.disabled_alert_body: Kaore tō pokapū e hiahia ana i te waenga īmēra i te takihi.
two_factor.help_text: Me pēhea: i muri i te whakauru i tō kupuhipa, ka tukuna e matou he waenga tau 6-kupu ki tō īmēra. Ka ahuatanga ngā waenga i muri i te 10 meneti, 5 ngā ngaronga anake ka whakaaetia ia waenga.
two_factor.could_not_send: Kaore i taea te tukuna te waenga
two_factor.could_not_verify: Kaore i taea te whakatūtuki te waenga
two_factor.menu_sub: Waenga īmēra i te takihi mō te kalitatanga nui ake

home.trending_in_nz: I te hiahia i Aotearoa Nui

home.no_match_body: Whakamatauria he tāpiri rerekē, whakaroa i tō wāhanga, arā tae ake - tae mai ngā raurangi hou ia rā.
orders_screen.title: Aku ngā raupapa
orders_screen.empty_body: Whakatairanga i tō raupapa tuatahi mai i ngā kaihoko puta noa i a Inia ka puta ake nei. Whakatauranga, whakahoki, me te whakatairanga anō kua noho tahi.

wishlist.empty_sub: Puru i te manawa o ia taonga hei tiaki mō a muri ake. Ka whakaatu matou i ngā whakapahea utu.

order_detail.refund_footnote: Ka tuku atu ō pīnei i roto i te 5–10 rā mahi. Mena e kore koe e kite i a ia i muri i tēnā, toha tēnei whakamahara ki ō kaari kaihoko, ki a ia rānei, ki tō tīma āwhina.

order_detail.note_required: Kōrero mai i a mātou (whai mea)

seller_payouts.earnings_analytics_sub: Raita te moni katoa, te utu kaihoko & te moni pütea kia ia wä me ia waahanga.
seller_payouts.stripe_payouts_sub: Honohono, whakahaere rānei i tō pükete pānga hei tango putea.
seller_payouts.how_it_works: Me pēhea te mahi a te putea
seller_payouts.reserve_held: {{pct}}% whakanatuhia mā {{days}} rä kia whakapare i ngä whakahoki.
seller_payouts.no_reserve: Kore whakanatuhia — me mau e koe te 100%.
seller_payouts.financing_sub: Tīkina te 70–90% whakamua i runga i ngä rīpinga whakatupuranga mā ngä hoa NBFC.
seller_payouts.empty_payouts: Kore putea—ka puta ake ia i te wā e tukua ai ngä rīpinga.
seller_payouts.how_step1: 1. Kaihoko e utu mā Stripe → ka tuhituhia ā moni hei
seller_payouts.how_step2: 2. Rīpinga ka tohua he tukua mā Shiprocket → tiimata te kaute whakaora.
seller_payouts.how_step3_b: rä, ka neke ā moni ki
seller_payouts.how_step4_reserve: 4. {{pct}}% whakanatuhia ka whakaora i muri i {{days}} rä atu.
seller_payouts.how_step_final_a: {{n}}. Admin e tohatoha mā Stripe → te āhuatanga ka huri ki
payouts_screen.title: Putea
payouts_screen.no_payouts_body: Ā i te wä ka hokohoko koe, ka puta ake ā moni ki konei.
seller_earnings.title: Moni
seller_earnings.footer_c: mō te nuinga o ngā waahanga,
seller_earnings.footer_d: mō te hīwahine. Ko ngā utu moni e whakaaturia ana kei konei te whakahaerae o ā koe ake i mua i te pupuri utu & tahua — tirohia
seller_referrals.title: Tohu Whakaari & Kimi Moni
seller_referrals.couldnt_load: Kaore i taea te uta i ngā tohu whakaari
seller_referrals.invalid_email: Tukuna he īmēra e tika ana
seller_referrals.invite_sent_body: Ka whakaatua {{email}} e te īmēra i te whakatupuranga.
seller_referrals.couldnt_send: Kaore i taea te tono tohu whakaari
seller_referrals.hero_title: Tohu whakaari ki a tetahi atu kaupapa pakihi Iniana
seller_referrals.hero_sub: Kimi moni 5 % o te utu papatupu i runga i ā rātou tuatahi NZ$10,000 o GMV — tae atu ki NZ$500 mō ia tohu whakaari i roto i te 12 marama.
seller_referrals.invite_section: Tohu whakaari ki te kaupapa pakihi
seller_referrals.no_referrals_sub: Tohu whakaari ki ā koe tuatahi kaupapa pakihi i runga nei ki te tīmata — ka whakaaturia rātou kei anei i te wā e whakamarietai ana rātou.
seller_referrals.how1: Tono ā koe tohu, ārahina rānei hononga ki te kaitaurima pakihi Iniana.
seller_referrals.how2: Ka noti rātou hei kaitaurima e whakamahi ana ā koe tohu.
seller_referrals.how3: Koia rā kua whakatūturu, ā, kua whakakainga ā rātou tuatahi hoko, ka kimi moni koe 5 % o te utu papatupu i runga i ā rātou tuatahi NZ$10,000 GMV.
seller_referrals.how4: Utu putea i ia wiki ki ā koe pahu utu putea (whakamataratia ki NZ$500 mō ia tohu whakaari, 12-marama matapihi).

admin_commission.footnote: Ka tatau anō ngā reiti mā te whakamahi i te mahere paepae ora ki ia raupapa ā-utu i roto i te matapihi. Whakatika `services/stripe_connect_svc.py` hei whakatūturu i ngā reiti wāhanga.
seller_stripe.get_paid_body: Whakatupu i tō pūkoro utanga kia taea ai e mātou te tuku i ō moni whakapainga i muri i te 14-rā return window o ia raupapa.
seller_stripe.active_body: Kua whakahohe ngā utanga. Ka tūpou ā mātou i tō toha o ia hoko ki tō panga aunoa.
seller_stripe.finish_body_more_details: Ka tonoa e Stripe ētahi atu taipitopito i mua i te whakahohea o ngā utanga.
seller_stripe.finish_body_didnt_finish: I timataia e koe te ōhanga engari kaore i oti — takahi ki raro hei haere tonu.
seller_stripe.toast_couldnt_load: Kaore i te taea te uta i te āhuatanga Stripe
seller_stripe.toast_couldnt_start: Kaore i te taea te timatahia te ōhanga Stripe
seller_stripe.toast_couldnt_open: Kaore i te taea te tuwhera i te Stripe dashboard
seller_stripe.info_payouts_body: I muri i ia raupapa ka tukua, ka pupuri mātou i te moni kaiwhiwhi i roto i te whare tiaki mō te 14 rā (te return window). Ka pātu te matapihi me te kore o te whakahoki, ka tuku ā mātou i ō moni whakapainga — aunoa — ki tō panga honoa Stripe ia Rāpare.
seller_stripe.info_fees_body: Ko te moni hokohoko marketplace Allsale he 12% o te utu taonga (ehara i te kawe). Ko te utu tukunga Stripe noa iho ka utua e Allsale — kaore i tangohia i tō utanga.
seller_bulk_edit.title: Whakatika nui i ngā rārangi hoko
seller_bulk_edit.action_set_price_hint: Te rite NZD utu mō ngā kōwhiringa katoa
seller_bulk_edit.action_set_stock_hint: Te rite pūtea tatau mō ngā katoa
seller_bulk_edit.action_toggle_avail_hin: Tohu hei i roto / i waho o te pūtea
seller_bulk_edit.action_delete_hint: Whakakore tūturu (kaore e taea te tarai anō)
seller_bulk_edit.delete_warn: Ka whakakore tūturu i ngā rārangi hoko kōwhiria.
seller_bulk_edit.err_select_one: Kōhiti i te iti rawa kia kotahi rārangi hoko
seller_bulk_edit.err_pct: Whakauru i te ōrau e.g. -10 or 15
seller_bulk_edit.err_pct_too_neg: Ko te ōrau ka iti/kore te utu
seller_bulk_edit.err_stock_delta: Whakauru i te delta pūtea e.g. -5 or +10
seller_bulk_edit.delete_msg_one: Whakakorea tūturu te 1 rārangi? Kaore e taea te whakatukinotanga.
seller_bulk_edit.delete_msg_other: Whakakorea tūturu {{count}} rārangi? Kaore e taea te whakatukinotanga.
seller_support_index.title: Kaipāpā tautoko
seller_support_index.no_tickets_body: Me kaha koe tautoko mō ngā utu, ngā ota, KYC, me ētahi atu mea? Tukia he kaipāpā, ka whakahoki ā te tīma tautoko.
admin_ambassadors_index.title: Ngā Ambasetara
admin_ambassadors_index.has_unpaid_only: Kei a ia te utu kāore i utua
admin_ambassadors_index.empty: Kaore he ambasetara e rite ana ki ō poupou tāhui.
seller_support_new.title: Tukia he kaipāpā
seller_support_new.help_text: Ka whakahoki mai i {{time}} mō {{priority}} kaipāpā whakatinana.
seller_support_new.subject_placeholder: He whakarārangi-rārangi noa iho o te raru
seller_support_new.describe_placeholder: Ngā pokapū hei tīpakohia, ngā taiawhe ota/utu, inaianei me te tino…
seller_support_new.warning_text: Kaua e whakahāngai kupurangi, tau kaari, me ngā mōhiotanga tūmau ā te kaiwhaiwhai.
seller_support_new.pri_medium_desc: E āhei ana ki ētahi wāhanga o tōku toa
seller_support_new.pri_high_desc: Te ārai i ōku mahi i tēnei rā
seller_support_new.limit_reached_body: E taea e koe te tāpiri ki te 4 āhua pūmua.
seller_support_new.permission_needed_bod: Me whai atu mātou i ō āhua kia tāpiri āhua pūmua.
seller_support_new.subject_too_short_bod: Tautoko i tō tikiti me he ūpoko marama (4+ karakter).
seller_support_new.need_more_detail: Hiahia noa ake i ngā taipitopito
seller_support_new.need_more_detail_body: Whākahokia te raru me te iti rawa kia 10 karakter.
seller_support_new.couldnt_raise: Kaore i taea te piki tikiti
admin_ambassador_detail.reason_too_short: Me 4 karakter te iti rawa mo te take
admin_ambassador_detail.reject_reason_bo: He aha te take i whakakāore ai e koe i tēnei panui?
admin_ambassador_detail.reject_default_r: Kaore e tutuki ki ngā aratohu ihirangi
admin_ambassador_detail.no_pending_submi: Kaore he tukutuki e tatari ana.
seller_support_detail.couldnt_load: Kaore i taea te uta tikiti
seller_support_detail.couldnt_submit_rat: Kaore i taea te tukutuki i te kaute
seller_support_detail.close_msg: E kore koe e taea te taapiri i ētahi atu whakahoki.
seller_support_detail.rate_prompt_body: Pā ki te whakatū i te kaute 1–5 whetu mō tēnei tikiti.
seller_support_detail.rate_modal_body: Ko tō kaute ka awhina i a mātou kaikaitoko kia pai ake. Pā i te whetu i raro.
seller_financing.title: Tāpiritanga moni
seller_financing.hero_title: Tīkina tāpiritanga i ō moni tono
seller_financing.hero_body: Kia kore e tatari i T+5/10 rā mō ō utu. Ka taea e ā mātou mahi NBFC te tāpiri i a koe 70–90% o ngā rauponga whakatapvā i roto i te 24h. Ka utu koe 1–2% utu — ka tatari rātou, ka reka ake koe.
seller_financing.not_eligible_title: Kaore anō ka taea — he {{tier}} koe i tēnei wā
seller_financing.elig_months: {{months}}+ marama i roto i te pakihanatanga
seller_financing.elig_gst: Pakihanatanga India kua rehiharatia i GST
seller_financing.apply_sub: Ka tukuna e māua ō tuhinga ki te hoa. Ka whakawhiti mai rātou ki a koe i {{hours}}h ki te whakahaere i a rātou KYC.
seller_financing.placeholder_notes: Āhuatanga e tika ai kia mōhiotia e te hoa…
seller_financing.not_eligible_fallback: Eke ki te Verified tier tuatahi.
seller_financing.enter_advance_body: Tukua koa te NZD 100 ki te iti iho.
seller_financing.interest_noted_body: Ka whakawhiti mai {{name}} ki a koe i {{hours}}h. Kua tohu atu hoki māua ki te tautoko Allsale.
admin_team.title: Rōpū
admin_team.owner_access_required: E hinahira ana te whakauru a te Rangatira
admin_team.email_name_required: E hinahira ana te īmēra + ingoa
admin_team.intro_body: Tōia mai ngā mema rōpū me te tukutukutia ō rātou whakauru i te mahi. Ka whakauru mai ngā sub-admins me te īmēra + kupuhipa i te mata urunui.
admin_team.initial_password_label: Kupuhipa tuatahi — kōpikopia INĀ (kua whakaaturia kotahi noa)
admin_team.share_password_body: Tohaina tēnei kupuhipa ki te admin hou i runga i te rautaki haumaru. Me te panuitanga i tō whakaurutanga tuatahi.
admin_team.new_password_label: Kupuhipa hou — kōpikopia INĀ (kua whakaaturia kotahi noa)
admin_team.share_reset_body: Tohaina i runga i te rautaki haumaru. Me panuitanga hou te admin i muri i te whakauru.
seller_upgrade.title: Haere hei kaihokohoko
seller_upgrade.intro: Kua whakauru koe. Whakaakona noa i ō pūmau pakihanatanga i raro nei ka whakamana e māua tō whānau i nga aroturi Kāwanatanga India.
seller_upgrade.referral_sub_a: Whakauru i ō rātou waehere i raro nei ki te tiki
seller_upgrade.referral_sub_b: — ā ka whaiwhai rātou i te taurima a te mea whakamutunga e taki ai tō pakihanatanga i ōna tuatahi rima raupapa.
seller_upgrade.referral_hint: Āhuatanga — waiho mā — me koe kāore he waehere.
seller_upgrade.error_default: Kaore i taea te whakatupuranga kaute
seller_welcome.title:
Whakatairanga i ō hua
ki ngā kaihokohoko o Aotearoa.
seller_welcome.subtitle: Ka hono a Allsale i ngā pakihi kua rēhitatia i Inia ki ngā kaihokohoko i Aotearoa Tūroa. Whakamātautia me tīmata te hoko i te minutu.
seller_welcome.req1_title: He pakihi kua rēhitatia i Inia
seller_welcome.req1_body: Kaore e whaimana te mea mahi takitahi — mō ngā kamupani anake tēnei papatuanuku.
seller_welcome.req2_title: GSTIN, PAN (me te CIN ki te pokapū)
seller_welcome.req2_body: Ka whakatauira āutomāta i ō pakihi i te ritenga o te Kawanatanga o Inia.
seller_welcome.req3_body: Ka whakamahia mō te whakatakotoranga whakatuku me te tiaki kaihokohoko.
seller_welcome.policy_title: He papatuanuku, e rua nga hunga
seller_welcome.policy_text: Ka hokohoko ngā kaihokohoko mai i Aotearoa Tūroa (allsale.co.nz). Me whai kamupani i Inia ngā kaihoko. Kaore i whakaaetia e mātou ngā kaihoko takitahi, kāore hoki i Inia i tēnei wā.
seller_welcome.already_have_account: Kei a koe anō he pūkete Allsale?
seller_pro.title: Allsale Pro
seller_pro.hero_body: Ka whakapoto a Allsale Pro i ō moni utu mai i 12% ki 9% ā kua whakaatu i ngā taputapu a ngā kaihoko nui.
seller_pro.price_sub: Whakakore i tetahi wa. Kaore he utu whakatūmatanui.
seller_pro.active_title: Kei a koe a Allsale Pro
seller_pro.will_cancel_body: Ka whakakorekore i te mutunga o tō wā o nāianei.
seller_pro.benefit1_body: Tiaki 25% i ia hokohoko. Ka utu i a ia anake i ₹17k marama GMV.
seller_pro.benefit2_body: Whetu gōld i ia whakatairanga — kua pānuitia e rua te huri takoha 5–15%.
seller_pro.benefit3_body: Ka tu atu ngā kaihoko Pro i roto i te rapu & whakatairanga hua.
seller_pro.benefit4_body: E wariu ana ₹1,000/marama - hoatu i ō SKU tino pai i te putea.
seller_pro.benefit5_body: Whakautu i te ra kotahi. Whakatikia ngā tautohetohe tere, tukua te moni tere.
seller_pro.benefit6_body: Huri SKU, puna hokohoko, whakaaro pukapuka whakatipa.
seller_pro.not_enabled_msg: Kei te mutunga tō rōpū i te tō. Tiro mai i muri.
seller_pro.couldnt_checkout: Kaore i taea te whakatimata i te rīhi
seller_pro.confirm_cancel_msg: E noho tonu ana ō painga kia mutunga i te wā tāmau o nāianei. Ka hoki koe ki te moni utu noa 12% whai ake.
seller_pro.cancel_scheduled_msg: E noho Pro kia mutunga te wā.
seller_pro.seller_policy_link: Pānui i te katoa o te Kaupapa Kaihoko
seller_sponsored.title: Whakatairanga tautokohia
seller_sponsored.hero_title: Whakatiki i te mea e hiahia koe kia hokohokona
seller_sponsored.hero_sub: Utu-i-ia-peke. Whakakake i ō putea, whakarite i te ohaoha o ia ra, tatai i tetahi wa.
seller_sponsored.empty_body: Whakatikitiki i te whakatairanga ki te kāinga, kāwai me ngā pahe rapu. Ka whakarite koe i te ohaoha o ia ra ā e utua ana koe i te takitaki anake ka peke ngā kaihokohoko.
seller_sponsored.delete_msg: Ka tino kauhoe tenei i te whakatikitiki mō {{name}}. Ka pokapokaia ngā tauanga mō te tāmau.
seller_sponsored.hint_estimate: Tōpū tūtuki: {{clicks}} paecī/aho. Ka whakatūturi whakaotinga ā-aho ka wetahi anō ā-apopo.
seller_sponsored.couldnt_create: Kāore i taea te waihanga kaupapa
seller_sponsored.wallet_meta: Kua tapiritia ${{topup}} · kua whakatutuki ${{spent}} iō whānuitanga
seller_sponsored.min_topup: Ko te tapiritanga iti kē $5 NZD
seller_sponsored.opening_stripe_body: Ka whānui hou tō pūtea pōkepoke i muri i te utu.
seller_profile.title: Kōrero toa
seller_profile.could_not_load: Kāore i taea te uta whakatakitaki
seller_profile.permission_needed_msg: Me whiwhi ake mātou i tō whakaaetanga ki ō whakaahua hei tuku i ō whakaahua toa.
seller_profile.check_input_msg: Whakauru i tō kupuhipuhi inaianei me tētahi kupuhipuhi hōu ≥ 8 arapū me tētahi tohu tau.
seller_profile.password_updated_msg: Kua whakatūrako mai i ngā āhuatanga kē.
seller_profile.could_not_change_password: Kāore i taea te whakahou i te kupuhipuhi
seller_profile.signout_confirm_msg: Ka noho koe ki konei. Me whakatomo anō ngā āhuatanga kē.
seller_profile.signout_done_body: Kua whakakore i ngā whakatupuranga kē.
seller_profile.banner_hint: Paecī hei tuku i te pita toa (16:9)
seller_profile.bio_placeholder: Toi-ā-ringa Inia pono — kua hangaia i Jaipur
seller_profile.address_warn: Ko te whakatika i te tūranga ka whakatakina anō te arotake KYC-a-kaiwhakahaere (7-rā SLA).
seller_profile.payout_help: Ka whakaatuhia te kōrero panga ki ngā kaitiaki mō te āwhina tohatoha. Ko te tuku tuuturu e whakamahi ana i Stripe — ko te 4 marama mutunga noa o tō kōwhiri ka tiakina.
seller_profile.bank_placeholder: Panga o te Karauna o Inia
seller_profile.pause_sub: Ka huna i ōku rārangi katoa i te kare o ngā kaihokohoko.
seller_profile.away_label: Kupu haere atu (whakaatuhia ki ngā korero e tere ana)
seller_profile.away_placeholder: I a au i te 20 Hūrae — ka haere atu ngā whakautu i tērā wā.
seller_profile.shipping_help: I whakamahi i ngā ETA kaihokohoko. Ngā rā whakapakihia & tuku i muri i te utu raupatu.
seller_profile.signout_all_btn: Tonoa mai i ngā atu pūroro katoa
seller_referrals_game.title: Painga tono hapai
seller_referrals_game.couldnt_share: I kore e taea te whakatuwhera i te pepa toha
seller_referrals_game.share_message: Kei te tipu ake taku pakipakinonga me Allsale — ka taea e nga kaihokohoko Indi te 15% toharite oranga. Ahuia me taku hononga: {{url}}
seller_referrals_game.empty_first_title: Kia tuatahi ki te papa kaihaungi
seller_referrals_game.empty_first_body: Tono i te kaihokohoko kua whakatupuranga kotahi i {{period}} ki te rewa ki #1.
seller_referrals_game.footer_hint: Ka whakamana matou i te kaihokohoko kua whakaoti i te whakamaori kaumātua. Ka 15% koe i ngā utu papawhānui i runga i o rātou 12 marama tuatahi o ngā ota.
seller_new_listing.title: Rārangi hou
seller_new_listing.photos_hint: Ko te whakaahua tuatahi te karapoi. Tāpiri ki {{max}} whakaahua.
seller_new_listing.photo_limit_msg: Ka taea koe te tāpiri {{max}} whakaahua ia rārangi.
seller_new_listing.photos_perm_msg: Whakatuwhera Tautuhinga kia whakaaetia ai te urupare whakaahua kia taea koe te tukuatu i ngā whakaahua hua.
seller_new_listing.upload_warning_msg: I kore te tukuatu; whakamahi i te kape ā-rohe.
seller_new_listing.couldnt_open_photos: I kore e taea te whakatuwhera i ngā whakaahua
seller_new_listing.couldnt_open_camera: I kore e taea te whakatuwhera i te kāmera
seller_new_listing.stock_oos_hint: 0 stoka te tikanga ka kite ngā kaihokohoko i tenei "Kore i te stoka".
seller_new_listing.size_placeholder: hoa., S, M, L, XL ranei Free Size
seller_new_listing.sizes_hint: Korekore. Waiho kau mo nga taonga kotahi noa te rahi.
seller_new_listing.description_placehold: Korero ki ngā kaihokohoko mo ngā rauemi, ine, he aha tona rerekē.
seller_new_listing.err_name_desc: Ingoa me te whakamārama (10+ pūāhua) e hiahiatia ana
seller_new_listing.err_photos: Tēnā tāpiri i te iti kotahi whakaahua hua.
seller_import.title: Kaupapa katoatoa kaupapa
seller_import.step0_sub: Kawea mai o rarangi e tū ana mai Amazon, Flipkart ranei ka roa i te mairangi — kore he tuhi anō.
seller_import.source_amazon_blurb: Tukuatu te .xlsx/.xlsm kaupapa tauira e whakamahi ana koe mo Amazon India.
seller_import.source_flipkart_blurb: Tukuatu te .xls kaupapa kōnae i tango mai koe i Flipkart.
seller_import.source_csv_blurb: He CSV ngāwari me sku, ingoa, utu, whakaahua. Ka whakahaere matou i te toenga.
seller_import.step1_sub: Tōia te konae i homai ki a koe e tō pātengi. Ka whakaae mātou i .xlsx, .xlsm, .xls me .csv tae rawa atu ki te 25 MB.
seller_import.pick_file: Pāwhiri ki te kowhiri i tētahi konae
seller_import.couldnt_read: Kāore i taea te pānui i tō kataloka
seller_import.couldnt_read_body: Ngana anō ki tētahi konae rerekē.
seller_import.couldnt_publish: Kāore i taea te whakaputa i ngā rārangi
seller_import.selected_one: I kowhiria te {{n}} hua hei whakaputa.
seller_import.margin_label: Pikinga i runga i te utu NZD (%)
seller_import.margin_help: Whakamahi puta noa i ngā mea kua kawekawe hei utu kawe me te hua.
seller_import.ai_help: Ka whakamaoria ki te Hīndi/Hinglish whakaahuatanga ki te Ingarihi me te tuhi anō i ngā roa blurbs ki te marama 5-bullet ahuatanga rārangi.
seller_import.step4_summary_a: I hangaia e mātou {{n}} rārangi hou
seller_import.step4_failed_one: {{n}} rarangi i rahua. Tirohia te kaiwhakahaere tahua mo ngā taipitopito.
seller_import.step4_failed_other: {{n}} rarangi i rahua. Tirohia te kaiwhakahaere tahua mo ngā taipitopito.

admin_users.search_placeholder: Rapua ma te īmēra, ingoa, mea rānei kamupani
admin_users.no_results_for: Kāore he hua mo "{{query}}". Ngana i tētahi rapunga rerekē.

admin_users.failed_to_load: I rahua te uta i ngā kaiwhakamahi

admin_users.reset_2fa_msg: Ka taea e te kaiwhakamahi te takiuru KĀORE tō authenticator app i te takiuru ake. Mahia anake i te muri o te tirotiro o ō tuakiri.

buyer_categories.subtitle: India → Aotearoa · 7-12 rā kaute pokapū
buyer_returns.title: Aku hokinga
buyer_returns.empty_body: Kei a koe te 7 rā o te tuku ki te tono hokinga. Kua tono koe, ka puta atu ki a ia me te whakatūtuki ahumomo.
buyer_returns.reason_wrong: I tae te kaupapa e haangai ana
buyer_returns.reason_not_described: Kaore i te penei te whakaahuatanga
buyer_returns.reason_changed_mind: I whakawhiti ahau i aku whakaaro

buyer_points.expiring_soon: ⚠️ {{n}} pts e pau ana i roto i te 30 rā
buyer_points.rate_cap: 📦 Kia 50% o te hoko kapu ka whakamahinga me tohe
buyer_points.empty_text: Kaore anō he mahi. Whakawhiwhia i te hoko, i te arotake ranei ki te tiimata whiwhi! ✨
buyer_points.reason_order_redeem: I whakamahinga i runga i te hoko

buyer_compare.empty_body: Pania "Tāpiri ki te whakataurite" i runga i te kaupapa e tahi kia timata i te whakataurite taha-ki-taha (kia 4 taonga).
buyer_notifications.title: Ngā Ī
buyer_notifications.empty_body: Ngā whakawhiti hoko, ngā whakakore me ngā ī tuku ka puta atu ki a ia.
buyer_notification_prefs.title: Ngā Notification
buyer_notification_prefs.hero_sub: Kōwhiri i ngā mea e whakaatua i roto i tō pāwhiri. Ka noho kite tonu ngā notification o mua — ka whakahaere ēnei pana i ngā mea e heke mai.
buyer_notification_prefs.section_inapp_b: I roto i te taupānga · Kai
buyer_notification_prefs.section_inapp_s: I roto i te taupānga · Kaiwhangai

legal_hub.title: Legal & Policies
legal_hub.hero_sub: Ngā kupu i whakaae ai koe ka pānui, mē te kawe, ngā whakahoki me ngā whakatutuki a ngā kaiwhangai.

ambassadors_landing.title: Kaupapa Ambahasadara
ambassadors_landing.unavailable: Kāore e watea ngā taipitopito kaupapa. Ngana anō.
ambassadors_landing.hero_sub: Waiho hei Ambahasadara Allsale. Toha i tō waehere, whai utu i ia raupapa — kia {{pct}}% ia hoko.
ambassadors_landing.section_how_you_earn: Me pēhea koe e whai pūtea (NZ · AU · US · UK · CA)
ambassadors_landing.tier_footnote: Ka whiwhi {{pct}}% wahaiti ō ō tamariki ki te whakamahi i tō waehere.
ambassadors_landing.india_p1: ₹{{bounty}} utu i ia kaiwhangai hou (i muri i {{trigger}} raupapa kawe) tae atu {{hot}}% o ngā utu papa mo {{months}} marama (karamata ₹{{cap}}) me {{tail}}% o te huripoka.
ambassadors_landing.india_p2: Ka whai anō ētahi Ambahasadara India i te waehere tamariki — akina te hoko diaspora ki waho me ngā whakatao kaiwhangai i India.
ambassadors_landing.section_why_join: He aha te take me tōpū ake
ambassadors_landing.feature_cookie_sub: Ka noho tō tamariki i tautuhia mo 90 rā
ambassadors_landing.join_footnote_prefix: Kore utu me tōpū ake · Kore kupu iti · Whakakapo mai
buyer_checkout_status.paid_sub: Kua whakaae tō raupapa me haere ana mai India ki tō tīmata NZ.
buyer_checkout_status.unpaid_sub: Kāore i tukuna atu he whakaae utu. Ka noho tonu tō kete kai — ngana atu i a koe i tautoko.
buyer_checkout_status.confirming_title: E whakaae ana i te utu…
buyer_checkout_status.confirming_sub: Tatari i a mātou e whakamatau i tō utu me Stripe.
buyer_country.hero_sub: Ngā taonga pono mai India, kawe ki te ao. Kōwhiri i tō whenua kia tika ai te utu me te kawe.
buyer_country.or_other_region: Āe, kai mai i tētahi āhua ke
buyer_country.app_banner_sub: Taki tere · Whakaraupapa raupapa · Whaimana tohu
buyer_prohibited.title: Whakāe i NZ?
buyer_prohibited.hero_title: Tirotiro mehemea ka whakāe te MPI NZ
buyer_prohibited.hero_sub: Tīpako te taonga e hiahia koe ki te kawe mai India. Ka kī atu mātou mehemea ka whakāe i raro i ngā ture katituraki NZ.
buyer_prohibited.banned: Kua whakahe e te MPI NZ
buyer_prohibited.common_body: Kai tumatanui · Tairy (ghee, pūwharite, tīhe, pata) · Kotare (beef, manu, mutton) · Hua me ngā āhuatanga hou · Hua pito · Honey · Tipu ora · Whenua
buyer_referrals_simple.title: Tono i ngā hoa
buyer_referrals_simple.couldnt_share: Ehara i te mea taea te toha
buyer_referrals_simple.hero_sub: Toha i tōu code ki ngā hoa. Ka whakatau +{{rewardee}} mokopuna. Ka whakatau koe +{{referrer}} mokopuna i te wā ka tukuwhā ai tō rātou taumahinga tuatahi.
buyer_referrals_simple.empty: Kaore anō ngā tono. Toha i tōu code kia tīmata ai koe ki te whakatau! ✨
buyer_saved_searches.title: Ngā rapu e tiakina ana
buyer_saved_searches.empty_title: Kaore anō ngā rapu e tiakina ana
buyer_saved_searches.empty_body: Whakamahi i ngā tākai i runga i ngā whārangi whakarōpū me te pāwhiri i "Tiaki i tēnei rapu" hei whakatikanga i roto i te tapahitanga kotahi.
buyer_saved_searches.delete_msg: E taea e koe te tiaki anō i ia i nga wa katoa.
ambassadors_join.title: Tono ki te ahumahi
ambassadors_join.lead: Whakamārama ake i tōu hononga. Ka puta i mātou tōu code tūturu.
ambassadors_join.india_banner_text: Ka whakatau koe i te code kaihoko (₹5% whakaiti + 5% tuturu) ME te code kaiwhāngai rapuhaunga (₹5K bounty + 10% rev-share). Akina ngā hokohoko i waho, me ngā kaiwhāngai ki te kāinga.
ambassadors_join.disclaimer: Ma te ahumahi, kae whakaae koe ki ngā Whakataunga Programme T&Cs. He motuhake, he māpuna ngā codes — kia whakaputaina, ehara i te rereketanga.
ambassadors_join.err_email: Whakauru i te email e tika ana
ambassadors_join.welcome_set_password: Whakatakitaki i te kupuhipuhi mai i ngā Whakataunga hei whakamuhunga anō i runga i tēhea atu taputapu.
ambassadors_join.fail_default: Ehara i te mea taea te uru. Whakamātai anō.
tax.in_gst_inclusive: GST kua āta whakauru ki te utu (18%)
admin_analytics.title: A/B Tātari
admin_analytics.err_load_recent: Raupapa o ngā ahuatanga hou kua rahua
admin_analytics.placeholder_experiment: Whakatakoto rānei i te taonga whakamatautau…
admin_analytics.empty_body_suffix: mai i tō kaweake. Ka puta ake te raraunga ki konei i roto i te hēkona.
admin_analytics.sig_small: ⚠️  He iti rawa te rahi tūturu hei whakatau — tatari i ngā whakatūpuranga atu.
admin_analytics.sig_thin: ⚠️  Tania tonu ngā hurihanga. Whāinga ≥ 30 ia ringa i mua i te whakatauira.
admin_analytics.sig_healthy: ✅  He āhuatanga maiki te rahi tūturu. Tautohe i te uara-p i waho mō te karanga ture.
admin_analytics.sig_gathering: ℹ️  He tūturu hāngai engari tonu te huihuinga. Kia tupato tonu.
ambassadors_dashboard.title: Amuamu
ambassadors_dashboard.share_msg: Whakamahi taku waehere {{code}} i Allsale mō {{suffix}}! https://allsale.co.nz/?ref={{code}}
ambassadors_dashboard.err_post_url: Whakatakoto i te hononga kōmaka https://
ambassadors_dashboard.post_submitted_bod: Ka whakatīhei mātou i tēnei wa.
ambassadors_dashboard.withdraw_queued_bo: {{amount}} — ka puta ki a koe i roto i ētahi ata mahinga.
ambassadors_dashboard.code_subtitle_b2c: Waehere kaihokohoko · 5% heke mō ngā kaihokohoko
ambassadors_dashboard.code_subtitle_b2b: Waehere whakahoki-kaihoko · Whakahoki i ngā pakihi Inia
ambassadors_dashboard.share_suffix_b2b: 3 marama Pro kore i a koe ka uru hei kaihoko
ambassadors_dashboard.tier_top: 🏆 Taumata o runga — kua tuturu koe!
ambassadors_dashboard.content_sub: Whakatakoto i tetahi hononga paukutunga pāpaho e tīkina ana koe i Allsale. Me {{n}}/marama i a mātou hei pupuri i ō taumata.
ambassadors_dashboard.sales_empty: Kaore anō te hokohoko. Tiri i tō waehere hei tīmata whiwhi!
ambassadors_dashboard.sellers_empty: Kaore anō te kaihoko whakahokohia. Tiri i tō waehere pakihi ki ngā kaiwhakatūpuranga e mohio ana koe.
ambassadors_dashboard.profile_open_full: Tuwhera i te ētita āhuatanga katoa →
ambassadors_dashboard.profile_save_faile: Ehara i te taea te tiaki
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_sub_banned: Ehara ēnei kaute i te whaiwhaiata mo te Ambassador Programme.
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_sub_rejected: Kia ora {{name}} — kua arotakehia e mātou ā tōu tono, ehara i te tutuki ki ā mātou āhuatanga o nāianei.
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_can_reapply_no: Ka taea mu atu te tono whakamuri inaianei
ambassadors_dashboard.rej_can_reapply_on: Ka taea mu atu te tono whakamuri i
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_sub: Tēnā {{name}} — te tikanga ka arotakea ngā tono ā roto i te 2 rā mahi. Ka īmēra atu ki a koe i te wā ka purei tō kod.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_code_label: Tō kod (kaore anō i te mahi)
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_terms_pending: Āta pānuitanga — kaupapa utu, he tono i ngā kaupapa tuhinga, he tika raupapa.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_terms_accepte: Ka arotake ā mātou rōpū i tōu tono ā roto i te 2 rā mahi.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_terms_failed: Ehara i te taea te whakaae
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_title: Kaore i tae mai te īmēra?
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_sub: Tukutuku anō te whakatūtūtanga tono ki {{email}}
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_rate_l: Āta tukutuku—tahi anō te tukutuku ia haora.
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_sent_b: Tirotiro tōu pōkete (me tō pōkete unaunahi, hei hānui).
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_signin: E hiahia ana ki te whakauru
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_resend_failed: Ehara i te taea te tukutuku anō
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_timeline_titl: He aha te mea ka harikoa ake
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_timeline_2_do: Kua whakaae koe i ngā T&C
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_timeline_3: Ka arotakea e mātou (1-2 rā mahi)
ambassadors_dashboard.pend_timeline_4: Ka tae mai tō īmēra & ka purei tō kod
seller_bulk_upload.title: Tukutuku tini
seller_bulk_upload.hero_title: Tāpiri, whakatika ranei i te maha o ngā rārangi i te wā kotahi
seller_bulk_upload.hero_body: He pai mo ngā pokapū rahi. Tango iho te tauira, whakatī i ō ngā hua i Excel / Google Sheets, ka tukutuku atu. Ka whakatūtūka e mātou ia rārangi i mua i te tiakina.
seller_bulk_upload.editing_label: E WHAKATIKA ANA KI NGĀ RĀRANGI TŌNA?
seller_bulk_upload.tile_export_csv_sub: Whakatika utu / pohipi i te tini
seller_bulk_upload.tip_prefix: Ka waiho ia rārangi hei hua kotahi. Waiho
seller_bulk_upload.tip_middle: takiwā ki te waihanga i ngā rārangi hou, me te pupuri atu hei whakamuri i ngā tōna inamata. Whakamahi
seller_bulk_upload.tip_suffix: ki te wehe i ngā rahi, ngā kara me ngā URLs pikitia.
seller_bulk_upload.zip_subtitle: Whakahau i ngā ingoa kōnae i tōau pepa — ka whakakapi atu e mātou ki ngā URLs tūturu.
seller_bulk_upload.upload_hint: Kia 1000 rārangi · max 8 MB · whakamahi URLs pikitia (ka waewae ā mātou).
seller_bulk_upload.file_failed_title: Kaore i te taea te pānui i te kōnae
seller_bulk_upload.nothing_title: Kaore he mea ki te tukutuku
seller_bulk_upload.nothing_body: Ko te maha o ngā rārangi he hapa. Whakatika me te ngana anō.
seller_bulk_upload.import_failed_title: Kaore i te taea te tukutuku atu
seller_bulk_upload.download_failed_body: Ehara i te taea te tango i te kōnae.
seller_bulk_upload.success_body: {{c}} i waihangahia · {{u}} i whakahoutia · {{s}} i whakatipakohia
